# Pull Request Template

## Description
Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue. List any dependencies that are required for this change.

---

## 🗿 Technical Prestige Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the [Design Philosophy](GEMINI.md).
- [ ] I have used the established color palette (Titanium, Slate, Platinum).
- [ ] Spacing and typography align with the premium aesthetic (macro-spacing, tracking).
- [ ] Transitions and animations are fluid and weighted (`cubic-bezier`).

---

## 🛠 Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

---

## ✅ Quality Assurance
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code.
- [ ] I have tested my changes in `npm run dev`.
- [ ] I have verified the build using `npm run build` and `npm run build:lib`.
- [ ] I have verified Deno compatibility with `deno check mod.ts`.
- [ ] My changes generate no new styling conflicts.

---

## 📄 Documentation
- [ ] I have updated the README.md if necessary.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation in the code.
